interfaces.name: Cadence
interfaces.signature: enum Cadence: String, Codable, CaseIterable { case weekly, biweekly, semimonthly, monthly }
interfaces.notes: Shared by Bill and Paycheck. Semimonthly requires a second reference date on the owning entity, not derived arithmetically.

interfaces.name: Bill
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Bill { var id: UUID; var name: String; var amount: Decimal; var cadence: Cadence; var anchorDate: Date; var secondAnchorDate: Date?; var createdAt: Date; var deletedAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: amount is Decimal, never Double. deletedAt drives #Predicate exclusion at fetch layer, never filtered post-fetch. Negative/zero amount rejected via validateAmount at input layer, not here.

interfaces.name: Paycheck
interfaces.signature: @Model final class Paycheck { var id: UUID; var amount: Decimal; var cadence: Cadence; var anchorDate: Date; var secondAnchorDate: Date?; var createdAt: Date; var deletedAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: Same shape as Bill for cadence/date handling. Reference date(s) clamp into shorter months per locked month-end rule.

interfaces.name: BalanceAnchor
interfaces.signature: @Model final class BalanceAnchor { var id: UUID; var amount: Decimal; var asOf: Date; var createdAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Appended, not mutated in place; freshness and the projection's starting point are computed from the most recent asOf, not createdAt.

interfaces.name: RunwayProjection
interfaces.signature: struct RunwayProjection { enum Status { case zeroData, billsOnly, fresh, stale }; var status: Status; var runwayEndDate: Date?; var daysRemaining: Int?; var fullness: Double; var freshnessDays: Int; var narrativeSentence: String; var dailyBalances: [DailyBalancePoint] }
interfaces.notes: dailyBalances is a byproduct of the sweep-merge engine; kept even though current UI only reads fullness/narrativeSentence, because it's the substrate for the future what-if/premium feature and the fill visual.

interfaces.name: DailyBalancePoint
interfaces.signature: struct DailyBalancePoint { var date: Date; var balance: Decimal }
interfaces.notes: One point per cash-event date, not one per calendar day — sparse, not dense, for performance.

interfaces.name: RunwayEngine
interfaces.signature: enum RunwayEngine { static let horizonYears: Int = 2; static func project(bills: [Bill], paychecks: [Paycheck], anchor: BalanceAnchor?, now: Date, calendar: Calendar = .autoupdatingCurrent) -> RunwayProjection }
interfaces.notes: Pure, SwiftData-free, SwiftUI-free. Must use Calendar.date(byAdding:to:) exclusively, never TimeInterval/epoch arithmetic. Same-day bills treated as already subtracted. Bills-only state (no paychecks) renders honest billsOnly status, never assumes a paycheck. Fallback to a day-by-day loop is pre-approved if sweep-merge test coverage is at risk.

interfaces.name: occurrences(for:anchorDate:secondAnchorDate:from:horizon:calendar:)
interfaces.signature: static func occurrences(for cadence: Cadence, anchorDate: Date, secondAnchorDate: Date?, from: Date, horizon: Date, calendar: Calendar) -> [Date]
interfaces.notes: Generates capped, month-end-clamped occurrence dates for one entity. Hard-stops at horizon regardless of cadence to prevent unbounded generation from a bad anchor date.

interfaces.name: ModelContainerFactory
interfaces.signature: enum ModelContainerFactory { static func makeContainer(inMemory: Bool = false) -> ModelContainer }
interfaces.notes: Single shared factory targeting the App Group ModelConfiguration (AppGroupIdentifier.value), cloudKitDatabase: .none, built from CisternMigrationPlan. Future widget target must call this identical factory.

interfaces.name: CisternSchemaV1
interfaces.signature: enum CisternSchemaV1: VersionedSchema { static var versionIdentifier: Schema.Version; static var models: [any PersistentModel.Type] { [BalanceAnchor.self, Bill.self, Paycheck.self] } }
interfaces.notes: First versioned schema, trivial single-version migration plan from day one per architecture review.

interfaces.name: CisternMigrationPlan
interfaces.signature: enum CisternMigrationPlan: SchemaMigrationPlan { static var schemas: [any VersionedSchema.Type] { [CisternSchemaV1.self] }; static var stages: [MigrationStage] { [] } }
interfaces.notes: Empty stages array acceptable for a single-version schema; the shape exists so a real migration can be added later without restructuring.

interfaces.name: EntryKind
interfaces.signature: enum EntryKind { case bill(Bill?), paycheck(Paycheck?), balance(BalanceAnchor?) }
interfaces.notes: Associated value nil means add-new; non-nil means editing that entity. Backs the single parameterized QuickAddSheet.

interfaces.name: QuickAddSheet
interfaces.signature: struct QuickAddSheet: View { let kind: EntryKind; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Handles add and edit for all three entity types. Uses validateAmount for inline validation-error and soft-confirmation states.

interfaces.name: HomeView
interfaces.signature: struct HomeView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: ScrollView-based (not fixed VStack) so max Dynamic Type sizes scroll instead of clip. Wraps @Query results, derives RunwayProjection, composes HeroRunwayText/CisternFillView/BalancePill/ComingNextRow/BillsOnlyBanner.

interfaces.name: HeroRunwayText
interfaces.signature: struct HeroRunwayText: View { let projection: RunwayProjection; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Single coherent accessibility element; posts an accessibility announcement on recompute after VoiceOver focus settles.

interfaces.name: CisternFillView
interfaces.signature: struct CisternFillView: View { let fullness: Double; let isStale: Bool; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Continuous warm/cool gradient driven by fullness; cross-fades instead of animating under accessibilityReduceMotion.

interfaces.name: BillsPaychecksListView
interfaces.signature: struct BillsPaychecksListView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: NavigationLink push from ComingNextRow. #Predicate-filtered @Query excluding deletedAt != nil.

interfaces.name: OnboardingFlow
interfaces.signature: struct OnboardingFlow: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Full-screen cover at first launch. Welcome -> paycheck quick-add -> bill quick-add -> optional balance step, all but welcome skippable with equal visual weight.

interfaces.name: PrivacyCoverView
interfaces.signature: struct PrivacyCoverView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Applied at window/root Scene level driven by scenePhase, above the entire presentation stack including open sheets — not scoped to HomeView.

interfaces.name: UndoToast
interfaces.signature: struct UndoToast: View { let message: String; let onUndo: () -> Void; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Backs soft-delete-with-undo for Bill/Paycheck via deletedAt nil-back.

interfaces.name: DataLoadErrorView
interfaces.signature: struct DataLoadErrorView: View { let retry: () -> Void; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Shown if ModelContainer construction/fetch fails at launch; never falls through to a silently empty Home.

interfaces.name: EmptyStateView
interfaces.signature: struct EmptyStateView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Zero-data invitation state, paycheck CTA emphasized over bill CTA.

interfaces.name: requestAccessibilityAnnouncement(_:)
interfaces.signature: func requestAccessibilityAnnouncement(_ text: String)
interfaces.notes: Wraps UIAccessibility.post(notification:.announcement) sequenced after VoiceOver focus settles post-sheet-dismissal.

interfaces.name: AmountValidation
interfaces.signature: enum AmountValidation: Equatable { case valid; case rejected(reason: String); case needsConfirmation(reason: String) }
interfaces.notes: Backs QuickAddSheet's inline validation. Negative/zero -> rejected; implausibly large -> needsConfirmation (soft, dismissible); otherwise valid.

interfaces.name: validateAmount(_:)
interfaces.signature: func validateAmount(_ amount: Decimal) -> AmountValidation
interfaces.notes: Single shared validation entry point used by all three QuickAddSheet entity kinds so the rule can't drift between bill/paycheck/balance forms.

interfaces.name: AppGroupIdentifier
interfaces.signature: enum AppGroupIdentifier { static let value: String = "group.com.cistern.shared" }
interfaces.notes: Single literal source of truth referenced by ModelContainerFactory; a future widget target must reference the same constant.

interfaces.name: QuickAddButton
interfaces.signature: struct QuickAddButton: View { let kind: EntryKind; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Docked entry point on Home for bill/paycheck; 44pt minimum tap target.

interfaces.name: BalancePill
interfaces.signature: struct BalancePill: View { let anchor: BalanceAnchor?; let onTap: () -> Void; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Persistent, always-visible, tappable from anywhere on Home; opens the balance QuickAddSheet.

interfaces.name: ComingNextRow
interfaces.signature: struct ComingNextRow: View { let summaryText: String; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Single-line summary (e.g. '2 bills before your next paycheck'); full-row 44pt tap target pushes to BillsPaychecksListView.

interfaces.name: SettingsView
interfaces.signature: struct SettingsView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Near-empty: appearance override, optional app-lock toggle (should-have), about/version, entry point to PremiumStubView.

interfaces.name: PremiumStubView
interfaces.signature: struct PremiumStubView: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Static list of PremiumFeatureRow entries (saved what-if scenarios, variable-income averaging, widget). No StoreKit import, no functional purchase button.

interfaces.name: PremiumFeatureRow
interfaces.signature: struct PremiumFeatureRow: View { let title: String; let detail: String; var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: One row per paid capability listed on PremiumStubView.

interfaces.name: BillsOnlyBanner
interfaces.signature: struct BillsOnlyBanner: View { var body: some View }
interfaces.notes: Shown on Home when bills exist but no paycheck is scheduled; states plainly that no income is assumed.
